title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Knight Frank India

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Knight Frank India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Knight Frank India in Chandigarh offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Knight Frank India:
Knight Frank India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Knight Frank India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
